name: Exercise Content
description: Exercise library curation, Crystal Yeo review process, reshoot planning, content loading pipeline, and phased launch content plan.

actions.task: Share Consolidated Curriculum v3 document with Crystal immediately on signing
Agree 12 launch areas with Crystal — within first week of engagement
Crystal to confirm reshoot list — before any filming is booked
Confirm Kinder Gym scope — Phase 1 or Phase 2?
Identify and engage content loading helper for Everfit upload (250 exercises, 50 workouts)
Build final loading sheet — exercise list, video file names, workout assignments, order
Book 2 filming days in Melbourne — target May 2026
QC all 50 launch workouts end-to-end before July 1

ideas: Phase 1 launches with ~50 workouts across 12 key areas showcasing ~250 exercises — curated showcase
Remaining curriculum sections loaded post-launch as a key retention lever
Hold the line at 12 areas, 4-5 workouts each — resist scope creep
